experiment: Twin-2K-500 holdout-question prediction (5 people x 8 MC questions, paper accuracy metric vs wave 1-3 truth)
criteria: paper-metric holdout accuracy (vs wave 1-3 truth) >= 0.6802 - 0.15 = 0.5302 AND >= analytic random mean + 1 SD of the 40-item random mean on the same 40 questions (one-sided z >= 1, ~0.602), with >= 90% of calls answered
